Super Micro (SMCI) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know Shares of server solutions provider Super Micro (NASDAQ:SMCI) jumped 3.4% in the morning session after Barclays raised its price target on the stock. The investment bank lifted its price target to $45.00 from $29.00, a significant increase of over 55%. Despite the substantial jump in the price objective, Barclays maintained its 'Equal-Weight' rating on the technology company's shares.
